selected_target.group: ชาโดว์ พาลาดิน

pair.source_name_th: กิกันต์เท็ค・ชัตเตอร์
pair.target_name_th: บลูเอสปาด้า・ดราก้อน

grade_additions.name_th: แดรกพรินซ์, รูต
ปราสาทโลกมาร, ไอน์แก๊งก์

grade_removals.name_th: จอมเวทแห่งการล่อลวง, อิลโดน่า

g_zone_future_system_work: G Zone deck slot model
Stride deck-building validation
G unit visibility and public-event policy
Stride timing and Generation Break runtime support

decision_options.label: Accept recipe repairs and keep G Zone deferred for validation rerun
decision_options.effect: Allows M57-02/M57-03 to record explicit recipe/repair choice, but runtime promotion remains blocked by G Zone decision.

decision_options.label: Accept original manual-review cards and keep advisory
decision_options.effect: Records that the team accepts manual cards for later review, but does not promote runtime.

decision_options.label: Request different repair or G Zone scope
decision_options.effect: Keeps the recipe advisory and asks for another repair candidate or explicit G Zone scope decision.

decision_options.label: Reject recipe runtime candidate
decision_options.effect: Keeps this recipe out of future fixture promotion gates.

g_zone_decision_options.label: Defer until G Zone runtime exists
g_zone_decision_options.effect: Keeps the recipe advisory until G Zone deck slots, Stride validation, and Generation Break support exist.

g_zone_decision_options.label: Main-deck-only review, no runtime promotion
g_zone_decision_options.effect: Allows review of the 50-card main deck but blocks fixture/runtime promotion.
